prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Compare how Prometheus metrics (counters, histograms, gauges) are registered and exposed in kubernetes/kubernetes vs grafana/grafana vs prometheus/prometheus itself. Find the Go source files in each repo that create and register metrics with a Prometheus registry.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the multi-org-go fixture.
prd.seed_prompt: Compare how Prometheus metrics (counters, histograms, gauges) are registered and exposed in kubernetes/kubernetes vs grafana/grafana vs prometheus/prometheus itself. Find the Go source files in each repo that create and register metrics with a Prometheus registry.
